message:
fix: rewrite AutoClose to avoid MySQL-invalid self-referencing subquery

The UPDATE + NOT IN (SELECT ... FROM same_table) pattern is MySQL Error 1093
and fragile in Dolt (dolthub/dolt#10600). Replace with two-step
SELECT-then-UPDATE using explicit ID list, matching the pattern already used
by bd mol wisp gc.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
